zh.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg是Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg和Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg的女兒，出生在薩辛。她於1372年8月17日之前與Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden在薩辛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1410年3月21日在她的家鄉，埋葬在薩辛。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg was born in Saxony as the daughter of Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg and Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg. She married Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden before 17 August 1372, in Saxony. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 21 March 1410, in her hometown, and was buried in Saxony.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg est née à Sachsen, fille de Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg et Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg. Elle a épousé Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden avant 17 août 1372, à Sachsen. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1410, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Sachsen.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg wurde in Sachsen, als Tochter von Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg und Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg geboren. Sie hat vor 17. August 1372 in Sachsen Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 21. März 1410 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Sachsen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg è nata il nel Sachsen come figlia di Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg e Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg. Lei sposato Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden prima del 17 agosto 1372, nel Sachsen. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 marzo 1410, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Sachsen.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 작센에서 Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(와)과 Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1372년 8월 17일 이전 작센에서 Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 3월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 작센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nasceu em Sachsen filha de Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg e Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg. Ela casou-se com Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden antes 17 de agosto de 1372, em Sachsen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 21 de março de 1410, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Sachsen.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig-Lüneburg родилась в местности сачсен. Её родителей звали Magnus II "Torqatus" von Braunschweig-Lüneburg и Katharina von Anhalt-Bernburg. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht I von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen Herzog von Braunschweig-Salzderhelden перед 17 августа 1372 г. в местности сачсен. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 21 марта 1410 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности сачсен.
